description: Permission comparison sorts both sides for set-equality; sibling comparisons are order-sensitive by design.
inspired_by: Set-equality vs sequence-equality bugs in access-control checks

findings.rationale: comparePermissions shares the shape of compareFields and compareRoutes but sorts both inputs before comparing. Permissions are a set; the sort is what makes the comparison order-independent. Unify it onto the order-sensitive helper and equivalent permission sets start comparing unequal — flaky authz decisions.
